spec.name: A Dead End Path On The River Bank In The Deep, Dark Forest
spec.description: You are on a narrow path leading through the deep, dark forest. The ancient trees stand so close that the path disappears between the dusty roots. To the south a dark river flows from east to west. The only exit appears to be east.

east.description: The narrow path winds its way through the trees to the east.

extra_descs.description: The river flows fast and strong. It is black or looks so in the gloom.
The ancient crowns of trees on both banks reach together forming a dense roof above the dark river.
The path seems all too frail. One of the giant roots could probably crush it in a single blow.
